devices.name: Steam Machine
devices.message: Valve's new compact living room PC. Semi-custom AMD Zen 4 CPU (6C/12T), RDNA 3 GPU (28 CUs), 16GB DDR5, 8GB VRAM. Targets 4K@60fps with FSR. 512GB or 2TB NVMe SSD options. Runs SteamOS 3.

specs.ports: DP 1.4, HDMI 2.0, 2x USB-A 3.2, 2x USB-A 2.0, USB-C 3.2, Ethernet, Wi-Fi 6E, BT 5.3

devices.name: Steam Controller (2026)
devices.message: Redesigned controller with magnetic analog sticks (drift-resistant), dual trackpads, gyro controls, haptic feedback. Up to 35 hours battery life. Pairs up to 4 via built-in 2.4 GHz receiver.

specs.features: Magnetic sticks, dual trackpads, gyro, haptics

devices.name: Steam Frame (VR)
devices.message: Standalone VR headset with Snapdragon 8 Gen 3. Dual 2160x2160 LCD displays, pancake lenses, 110° FOV, 72-120Hz (exp. 144Hz). Only 440g total. Supports PC streaming via Steam.

devices.name: Steam Deck
devices.message: Steam Deck OLED and LCD models available now on the Steam Store. Portable PC gaming handheld running SteamOS.
